recipe.title: Thu Apr 16 — American Goulash
ingredients: Chopped fresh parsley, chives, or dill
steps: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion, cook until translucent, ~5 min. Add garlic, cook 1 min.
Add ground beef, raise heat to medium-high. Cook, crumbling meat, until browned, ~6 min. Drain excess fat if needed.
Stir in beef broth, tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, Worcestershire, seasoned salt, Italian seasoning, paprika, and pepper. Bring to a simmer.
Add elbow macaroni, cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until pasta is tender, ~12–15 min.
Stir in cheddar until melted. Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs.
